10#include "llvm-c/Analysis.h"
11#include "llvm-c/Initialization.h"
12#include "llvm/IR/Module.h"
13#include "llvm/IR/Verifier.h"
14#include "llvm/InitializePasses.h"
15#include "llvm/PassRegistry.h"
16#include "llvm/Support/raw_ostream.h"
17#include <cstring>
18
19using namespace llvm;
20
21/// initializeAnalysis - Initialize all passes linked into the Analysis library.
22void llvm::initializeAnalysis(PassRegistry &Registry) {
23 initializeAliasAnalysisAnalysisGroup(Registry);
24 initializeAliasAnalysisCounterPass(Registry);
25 initializeAAEvalPass(Registry);
26 initializeAliasDebuggerPass(Registry);
27 initializeAliasSetPrinterPass(Registry);
28 initializeNoAAPass(Registry);
29 initializeBasicAliasAnalysisPass(Registry);
30 initializeBlockFrequencyInfoPass(Registry);
31 initializeBranchProbabilityInfoPass(Registry);
32 initializeCostModelAnalysisPass(Registry);
33 initializeCFGViewerPass(Registry);
34 initializeCFGPrinterPass(Registry);
35 initializeCFGOnlyViewerPass(Registry);
36 initializeCFGOnlyPrinterPass(Registry);
37 initializeCFLAliasAnalysisPass(Registry);
38 initializeDependenceAnalysisPass(Registry);
39 initializeDelinearizationPass(Registry);
40 initializeDominanceFrontierPass(Registry);
41 initializeDomViewerPass(Registry);
42 initializeDomPrinterPass(Registry);
43 initializeDomOnlyViewerPass(Registry);
44 initializePostDomViewerPass(Registry);
45 initializeDomOnlyPrinterPass(Registry);
46 initializePostDomPrinterPass(Registry);
47 initializePostDomOnlyViewerPass(Registry);
48 initializePostDomOnlyPrinterPass(Registry);
49 initializeIVUsersPass(Registry);
50 initializeInstCountPass(Registry);
51 initializeIntervalPartitionPass(Registry);
52 initializeJumpInstrTableInfoPass(Registry);
53 initializeLazyValueInfoPass(Registry);
54 initializeLibCallAliasAnalysisPass(Registry);
55 initializeLintPass(Registry);
56 initializeLoopInfoPass(Registry);
57 initializeMemDepPrinterPass(Registry);
58 initializeMemoryDependenceAnalysisPass(Registry);
59 initializeModuleDebugInfoPrinterPass(Registry);
60 initializePostDominatorTreePass(Registry);
61 initializeRegionInfoPassPass(Registry);
62 initializeRegionViewerPass(Registry);
63 initializeRegionPrinterPass(Registry);
64 initializeRegionOnlyViewerPass(Registry);
65 initializeRegionOnlyPrinterPass(Registry);
66 initializeScalarEvolutionPass(Registry);
67 initializeScalarEvolutionAliasAnalysisPass(Registry);
68 initializeTargetTransformInfoAnalysisGroup(Registry);
69 initializeTypeBasedAliasAnalysisPass(Registry);
70 initializeScopedNoAliasAAPass(Registry);
71}
72
73void LLVMInitializeAnalysis(LLVMPassRegistryRef R) {
74 initializeAnalysis(*unwrap(R));
75}
76
77LLVMBool LLVMVerifyModule(LLVMModuleRef M, LLVMVerifierFailureAction Action,
78 char **OutMessages) {
79 raw_ostream *DebugOS = Action != LLVMReturnStatusAction ? &errs() : nullptr;
80 std::string Messages;
81 raw_string_ostream MsgsOS(Messages);
82
83 LLVMBool Result = verifyModule(*unwrap(M), OutMessages ? &MsgsOS : DebugOS);
84
85 // Duplicate the output to stderr.
86 if (DebugOS && OutMessages)
87 *DebugOS << MsgsOS.str();
88
89 if (Action == LLVMAbortProcessAction && Result)
90 report_fatal_error("Broken module found, compilation aborted!");
91
92 if (OutMessages)
93 *OutMessages = strdup(MsgsOS.str().c_str());
94
95 return Result;
96}
97
98LLVMBool LLVMVerifyFunction(LLVMValueRef Fn, LLVMVerifierFailureAction Action) {
99 LLVMBool Result = verifyFunction(
100 *unwrap<Function>(Fn), Action != LLVMReturnStatusAction ? &errs()
101 : nullptr);
102
103 if (Action == LLVMAbortProcessAction && Result)
104 report_fatal_error("Broken function found, compilation aborted!");
105
106 return Result;
107}
108
109void LLVMViewFunctionCFG(LLVMValueRef Fn) {
110 Function *F = unwrap<Function>(Fn);
111 F->viewCFG();
112}
113
114void LLVMViewFunctionCFGOnly(LLVMValueRef Fn) {
115 Function *F = unwrap<Function>(Fn);
116 F->viewCFGOnly();
117}
